category_title: Disruptive and ideologically oppositional student in a teacher education course
minimal_context: The student approaches the lecturer's desk at the end of the lesson to hand in a physical copy of a manifesto she posted on the course's internet forum.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Class is over now. Did you need to hand something in?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Approaches the desk and hands over a copy of a letter) I could not find your box and did not have your address.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Thank you for handing this to me. What is this letter regarding?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It is the manifesto I published on the course's internet forum. Today’s lesson was no different from previous lessons. I want to protest against the level, the conduct of the teacher and the way the material is taught.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I see. What specific concerns are you raising in this document?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: There are discussions of observations, which may have been conducted without obtaining consent. The course is conducted in a theatrical and joking manner, what I would call worthless psychology. I consider this to be inappropriate for a religious university and unsuitable for the students.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Class is over now. Did you need to hand something in?

STUDENT: (Approaches the desk and hands over a copy of a letter) I could not find your box and did not have your address.

TUTOR: Thank you for handing this to me. What is this letter regarding?

STUDENT: It is the manifesto I published on the course's internet forum. Today’s lesson was no different from previous lessons. I want to protest against the level, the conduct of the teacher and the way the material is taught.

TUTOR: I see. What specific concerns are you raising in this document?

STUDENT: There are discussions of observations, which may have been conducted without obtaining consent. The course is conducted in a theatrical and joking manner, what I would call worthless psychology. I consider this to be inappropriate for a religious university and unsuitable for the students.
